## Review checklist

- [ ] Tests cover the changed behavior or bug.
- [ ] Camera, privacy, offline-runtime, and non-medical guarantees remain intact.
- [ ] UI changes remain keyboard accessible and understandable without color alone.
- [ ] New dependencies or assets are necessary, pinned, and documented.
- [ ] No generated app, personal camera material, raw landmarks, secrets, or identifying paths are committed.
- [ ] Relevant user or technical documentation is updated.
